# Feature Specification
<!-- Generated by handover v1.2.1 -->

Full specification for the work being implemented. Read this before picking
up a task from `tasks.md`.

## Goal

Build context-router as a local CLI + MCP server that selects the minimum useful context for coding agents, supporting Python/Java/.NET/YAML codebases, Claude Code/Copilot/Codex agents, single-repo and multi-repo workspaces, and four task modes: review, debug, implement, handover.

## Scope

### In scope for v1
- Monorepo project structure with clean package boundaries
- Shared contracts package (Pydantic schemas and plugin interfaces)
- SQLite + FTS5 storage with repository pattern
- Tree-sitter-based language analyzers for Python, Java, C#/.NET, YAML
- Structural graph index: symbols, dependency edges, test mapping
- Deterministic ranking engine with mode-specific strategies
- Runtime signal parsers: pytest XML, JUnit XML, dotnet test, raw stack traces, generic logs
- Durable memory: observations, decisions, stale detection
- Token estimator (model-agnostic, character/line based)
- CLI with: init, index, watch, pack, decisions, memory, benchmark, mcp
- MCP server with 8 tools: build_index, update_index, get_context_pack, get_debug_pack, search_memory, get_decisions, explain_selection, generate_handover
- Three agent adapters: Claude, Copilot (instructions + custom agents), Codex
- Multi-repo workspace: up to 3 repos, workspace.yaml, cross-repo link inference
- Benchmark harness with 20-task sample suite across 4 sample repos

### Out of scope
- Cloud sync, hosted service, web UI
- Vector DB or embeddings
- More than 3 agent adapters
- More than 4 languages
- Autonomous code execution or PR merging

## Requirements by module

### contracts
- ContextItem: id, source_type, repo, path_or_ref, title, excerpt, reason, confidence, est_tokens, freshness, tags
- ContextPack: id, mode, query, selected_items, total_est_tokens, baseline_est_tokens, reduction_pct, created_at
- Observation: timestamp, task_type, summary, files_touched, commands_run, failures_seen, fix_summary, commit_sha, repo_scope
- RuntimeSignal: source, severity, message, stack, paths, timestamp
- LanguageAnalyzer interface: detect(path) -> bool, analyze(path) -> AnalysisResult
- Ranker interface: rank(candidates, task_context) -> RankedResult
- AgentAdapter interface: transform(pack) -> AdapterOutput

### graph-index
- Scan all files in repo using language plugin detection
- Extract symbols: functions, classes, methods, endpoints, schemas
- Extract dependency edges: imports, calls, inheritance, schema refs
- Map test files to source files using framework naming patterns
- Store incremental snapshots keyed by file path + mtime
- Re-index only changed files on watchdog events
- git diff ingestion: extract changed files and hunk summaries per commit

### ranking
- Review mode weights: changed files > blast radius > impacted tests > config touched
- Debug mode weights: runtime signal match > failing tests > recent commits > prior fixes > call chain
- Implement mode weights: entrypoints > data contracts > extension points > prior pattern
- Handover mode weights: changed files > decisions > failures > open TODOs
- Token budget enforcement: truncate/drop lowest-confidence items to stay under budget
- Explain output: one human-readable sentence per selected item

### runtime
- pytest XML parser: extract test name, failure message, stack, file path
- JUnit XML parser: same schema
- dotnet test output parser: same schema
- Generic stack trace parser: extract frames, file paths, line numbers
- Log ingestion: extract ERROR/WARN lines with timestamps and paths
- All parsers emit normalized RuntimeSignal objects

### memory
- Store observations after agent sessions (manual and auto)
- Store decisions with tags and repo scope
- FTS5 search over observations and decisions
- Flag observations as stale when referenced file paths no longer exist in index
- CLI: `context-router memory add`, `decisions search`, `decisions add`

### workspace
- Load workspace.yaml: repos, links, entrypoints
- CLI: `workspace init`, `repo add`, `repo list`, `link add`
- Auto-detect cross-repo links from: imports, OpenAPI/proto, URLs, CI/deploy refs
- Track per-repo branch, commit SHA, last-indexed timestamp, dirty state
- All packs in multi-repo mode label items with `[repo-name] path`

### adapters
- Claude: generate task-specific prompt preamble from ContextPack
- Copilot: generate `.github/copilot-instructions.md` and `.github/agents/{review,debug,implement,handover}.agent.md`
- Codex: generate subagent task prompt with context items inlined

## Edge Cases

- Repo with no tests: test mapping returns empty, ranking continues without test signals
- Workspace with repos on different branches: emit warning in pack metadata, do not block
- Stack trace referencing a file not in index: include as RuntimeSignal-only item, no code excerpt
- Token budget exceeded: drop lowest-confidence items first, always keep at least 1 item per source_type
- YAML file with no recognizable k8s/CI structure: fall back to key-path extraction only
- Memory observation references deleted file: flag as stale, include with stale=true tag
- Multi-repo query that touches only one repo: return single-repo pack, workspace metadata still present
- .context-routerignore patterns: apply before indexing, not after ranking
